utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details (coverage type and costs):
- health_coverage: Specifies physical and mental health insurance components with named plans and individual monthly costs, plus subtotal; acceptable.
- property_coverage: Specifies home/contents insurance with a named plan and monthly cost; acceptable.
- travel_coverage: Specifies travel insurance with a named plan and monthly cost; acceptable.
- additional_services: Specifies an enhancement service with a monthly cost; acceptable.
- total_budget: Provides a complete monthly and annual cost after discount; acceptable.
Thus, all 5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I identified each item named in the final coverage plan and matched it to the exact corresponding item name in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, Adventure Travel Coverage (an enhancement under travel_enhancement_services), LifeFirst Standard Coverage for property/home contents, LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance, and Premium Insurance Membership under general_services. I then pulled the exact ratings for each of these items.
